texto: A yogi realizes the divinity in him and the divinity that is present in this world. In his own heartbeat and his own regular breath he feels the flow of all the seasons and the throbbing touch of universal life.
explicacao: Citação de Fr. Joe Pereira sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “A yogi realizes the divinity in him and the divinity that is present in this world. In his own he…” articula reflexao, yoga, divinity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
